name: Mozzarella and Sun-Dried Tomato Bread ABM
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the sun-dried tomatoes well and reserve the oil for use in the bread.
2. Allow all ingredients to come to room temperature before starting.
3. Pour all ingredients into the bread machine's baking bowl in the following order: yeast, garlic powder, flour, sugar, salt, olive oil, water, shredded mozzarella, and chopped sun-dried tomatoes.
4. Set the "baking control" at eleven o'clock on the bread machine.
5. Select the "white bread" cycle and press Start.
6. The bread will bake according to the settings for a 1-1/2 lb R2D2 bread machine.
7. According to Sylvia's comment, nutritional information per slice is: 67 calories, 1 gram fat, 1 milligram cholesterol, 147 milligrams sodium, and 19% of calories from fat.
Note: This recipe was shared by Sylvia Steiger on GEnie under the STEIGERS directory with ID CI$ 71511.
